name: How long do I have to file a case if AI evidence hurts my claim in New York?
description: Usually 3 years in NY for injury claims—AI evidence doesn't extend it, file soon.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a case if AI evidence hurts my claim in New York?

acceptedAnswer.text: Usually 3 years in NY for injury claims—AI evidence doesn't extend it, file soon.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Generally 3 years from injury for personal injury in NY, but consult for your facts.[1] AI evidence like *Heppner* doesn't toll statutes; discovery issues arise during litigation.[1][3] Federal courts apply state limits.

**Key factors:**
- NY CPLR §214: 3 years negligence.
- Discovery rule rare for injuries.
- AI chats may accelerate defenses.

File promptly to control narrative before AI records surface. Lawyer review essential pre-statute expiration.[1] Track all deadlines tightly.
